SAILOR: This door is closed, of course. If not, you'd fall right into the ocean!

Certain dialogue options in this game ca: Certain dialogue options in this game can affect how characters see you.
Pokémon Rejuvenation has a friendship va: Pokémon Rejuvenation has a friendship value system.
Depending on your dialogue choices, char: Depending on your dialogue choices, characters will respond differently, and either gain or lose friendship value.
Friendship values may change dialogue, a: Friendship values may change dialogue, and other events that happen later. Choose your words carefully!

May I see your Trainer Card?: May I see your Trainer Card?

AUGUSTUS: Oh-hoho! That's what I like to: AUGUSTUS: Oh-hoho! That's what I like to hear. I've done my very best to keep things nice and orderly on this ship.

Pokémon seem to act somewhat differently: Pokémon seem to act somewhat differently in this region.
They only follow orders of trainers they: They only follow orders of trainers they respect. We've done a plethora of research on this phenomenon.
As a result of that research, it seems t: As a result of that research, it seems that \c[6]Pokémon obedience is directly linked to the amount of Badges a trainer has.
Oddly enough,\\c[6] Pokémon stop gaining: Oddly enough,\c[6] Pokémon stop gaining exp at a certain level until a new Badge is received as well.

It is standard that each Trainer Card ha: It is standard that each Trainer Card have these level caps listed below each Badge slot.

VARIYA: Correct.\\c[6] You fit the crite: VARIYA: Correct.\c[6] You fit the criteria for my next Interceptor.
